message:
audit: batch 478 — channels + sync primitives all SOUND

broadcast.rs (1442L), oneshot.rs (1751L), watch.rs (1694L): all channels
verified — two-phase patterns, waker dedup, wake-outside-lock.

mutex.rs (1451L), semaphore.rs (1699L): FIFO waiter queues, baton
passing, cancel-safe drop, no nested locks.

supervision.rs + gen_server.rs agent still running (~14K lines).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
